---
title: Stoked to be awarded with the Graduate School 2025 Summer Research Grant
subtitle: "" 
author: "Ray Parcon"
date: "2025-04-11"
slug: "2025-04-11-summer-grant"
categories: ["Grants", "Academic", "Awards"]
toc: true 
description: >
    This grant enables doctoral students to conduct research in support of their dissertations.
summary: 
image: "featured.jpg"
---

![](featured.png){.post-banner fig-alt="Ray standing in a greenhouse with soybean plants"}

I am grateful to receive funding support from the Graduate School for my research this summer! Definitely a motivation to believe in and continue the work. A timely, great news as my virulence phenotyping assays are underway!
